mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_like (user_id, work_id, is_delete, time) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{work_id}, #{is_delete}, #{time})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_like WHERE work_id = #{workId} AND is_delete = 0

SELECT w.work_id, w.user_id, w.work_title, w.img_url, w.series_id, w.like_count, w.star_count, w.view_count, w.is_original_work, w.out_url, w.update_time, w.update_user, w.create_time, w.create_user FROM tb_like l INNER JOIN tb_works w ON l.work_id = w.work_id WHERE l.user_id = #{userId} AND l.is_delete = 0 AND w.is_delete = 0 AND w.approval_status = 10 ORDER BY l.time DESC
